import React, { use, useState } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; function EditCategory() { const [categoryInput, setCategory] = useState([]); useEffect(() => { const category_id = props.match.params.id; axios.get(`/api/categories/${category_id}`).then(res => { if (res.status === 200) { setCategory(res.data.category); } }); }, [props.match.params.id]); const handleInput = (e) => { e.persist(); setCategory({...categoryInput, [e.target.name]: e.target.value}); } return(
